case_title: TEOLA YOUNG-PARTAIN et al VS. SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION et al

docket_entries.description: MINI MINUTES FOR NOV-28-2011 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG-PARTAIN, TEOLA ,AN INDIVIDUAL GARCIA, DOMINIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL AS TO DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION DOES 1 TO 40 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-13-2012 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-11-2011 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         DEC-29-2011
NTC OF MTN AND MTN TO DISMISS OR STAY PLTF'S ACTION, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC HEARING SET FOR NOV-28-2011 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 302
ORDER GRANTING DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO STAY PLAINTIFFS' ACTION

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC'S NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PLAINTIFF'S ACTION IS CONTINUED TO 11/30/11 PER AGREEMENT OF PARTIES. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; COURT REPORTER: SONIA WONG, CSR #11288
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF DISMISSAL AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG-PARTAIN, TEOLA ,AN INDIVIDUAL GARCIA, DOMINIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-12-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF YOUNG-PARTAIN, TEOLA ,AN INDIVIDUAL GARCIA, DOMINIQUE AN INDIVIDUAL SERVED SEP-14-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC, A DELAWARE CORPORATION
REPLY TO PLTFS OPPOS TO MOTION TO DISMISS FILED BY DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC'S MOTION TO DISMISS OR STAY PLAINTIFF'S ACTION - THE STAY IS GRANTED. ALL OF PLAINTIFFS' CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON ALLEGED BREACHES OF THE AGREEMENTS. PLAINTIFFS HAVE NOT SATISFIED THEIR BURDEN OF SHOWING THAT THE FORUM SELECTION CLAUSES ARE UNREASONABLE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN, COURT REPORTER: LAVENA WARD, CSR 7077

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-13-2012 CONTINUED TO OCT-12-2012 AT 2:00 PM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR STATUS OF STAY. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-01-2012 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Dec-30-2011 Continued To Oct-12-12 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Seed Media Group Llc'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiff'S Action
Off Calendar Nov-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Cole, Esq., Law Offices, 415-978-9999, for Defendant and moving party
Abraham Mertens, Esq., Law Offices, 415-822-1922, for Plaintiff and opposing party

Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling on Defendant Seed Media Group Llc'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiff'S Action.
The stay is Granted. All of plaintiffs' causes of action are based on alleged breaches of the agreements. Plaintiffs have not satisfied their burden of showing that the forum selection clauses are unreasonable. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Court Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR 7077

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Dismiss Or Stay Pltf'S Action
Off Calendar Nov-28-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Christopher Cole, Esq., Law Office, 415-978-9999, for defendant and moving party
Abraham Martens, Esq., Law Office, 415-822-1922, for plaintiff and opposing party

DISCUSSED and the Court vacated its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT SEED MEDIA GROUP LLC's Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay Plaintiff'S Action is continued to 11/30/11 per agreement of parties. Courtesy copies of the opposing papers provided to the court at the hearing. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Court Reporter: Sonia Wong, CSR #11288
